headline: FedEx inks MOU with China-based airline to boost air cargo network
summary: The partnership with China Southern Air Logistics could make Guangzhou a key connection for U.S. shipments to Southeast Asia, Cirrus Global Advisors founder Derek Lossing said.

headline: FedEx slowly recovers from operational meltdown in Vietnam
summary: FedEx says it has significantly reduced cargo backlogs at its warehouses in Vietnam after a messy switch to a new ground delivery partner and new technology system. The post FedEx slowly recovers from operational meltdown in Vietnam appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: How To Earn $500 A Month From FedEx Stock Ahead Of Q4 Earnings
summary: FDX (NYSE: FDX) will release Q4 earnings on June 23. Analysts expect $5.92/share, lower than last year. Barclays maintains Overweight rating.

headline: FedEx Gears Up For Q4 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
summary: FedEx (NYSE: FDX) will release Q4 earnings on June 23, with analysts expecting a decrease in earnings and an increase in dividend rate. Analysts have mixed ratings for FDX stock.
